name: Sopa De Lima
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Chicken, skinned and boned, diced
3/4 cup Italian tomatoes, canned, drained and seeded, diced
1 Strip of grapefruit peel (about 2 X 1/4-inch strip)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2- or 3-quart saucepan, heat oil over medium-high heat; add annatto seeds and cook until the seeds release their color, about 1 to 2 minutes. Remove and discard the seeds.
2. Add onions, bell pepper, and garlic to the saucepan and sauté until onions are translucent, about 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Add water, chicken, tomatoes, broth mix, oregano, and pepper to the saucepan. Squeeze the lime halves into the soup.
4. Add the squeezed lime halves and grapefruit peel to the soup and stir to combine.
5. Reduce heat to low and let simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Using a slotted spoon, remove and discard the lime halves and grapefruit peel.
7. Let the soup simmer for an additional 15 minutes.
8. While the soup is simmering, spray a 9-inch skillet with nonstick cooking spray and heat over medium heat. Add tortillas one at a time and cook, turning once, until lightly browned on both sides. Cut the tortillas into thin strips.
9. To serve, ladle the soup into four bowls and top each portion with about 1/4 of the tortilla strips. Makes 4 servings, approximately 1 1/2 cups each.
